closed_axis_summary_since_this_run.summary: Still running; no result to classify; no duplicate grid launched.
WEAK_SIGNAL only: best mean Δ +0.0003667, min Δ -0.0012002, 2/3 positive, fixes/breaks 252/230, p=0.3388. Not a strict improvement axis.
Killed by 600s timeout before completion; script was optimized and rerun as bounded smoke.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Expanded jackknife seed/capacity uncertainty boundary rerank
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.independence: Uses only model-family seed uncertainty, capacity disagreement, and boundary-local calibration from emb128/emb192 validation scores; no UserKNN, DNS, hours confidence, exact-K, temporal features, text semantics, or test candidate marginal.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_credible: Smoke found a small positive mean in vote-consensus capacity-gap gates on 2/3 splits and writes row-level score artifacts; expansion checks whether wider bands/weights repair split42 without over-claiming.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.independence: User-neighborhood residual from train interactions, distinct from seed uncertainty; already running from prior process.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_credible: Prior 3-split weak signals around +0.0008~+0.0009; fine-grid may determine whether this is robust or noise.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Per-user calibration of existing rankblend by unsupervised margin strata only
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.independence: Would avoid new model families and use only rankblend margin/error-prone strata; not launched because the jackknife expansion is already testing a stronger boundary-local uncertainty version.
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.why_credible: Could identify low-margin regimes where public-best rankblend is unstable.
